ablation.evidence: Integrated personas are compared against a neutral rule baseline in m57_comparative.json.

artifact_freshness.evidence: Artifacts are generated in the same run and paths are listed under freshness.generated_artifact_paths.

causality.evidence: Raw-chat implantation produces runtime personas whose action distributions and memories evolve through chat turns.

determinism.evidence: Canonical seed family: [57, 7158, 7159, 7160, 7161, 7162]. Synthetic raw generation and scenario battery are seed-bound.

regression.evidence: Report declares the required M5.0/M5.1/M5.2/M5.3/M5.5/M5.6 regression command set.

schema.evidence: JSON artifacts use explicit artifact_type/schema_version where applicable and are parse-checked by tests.

stress.evidence: Manipulation, context switching, private-memory pressure, emotional leverage, long input, and safety layer checks are recorded.

gates.evidence: raw logs were parsed by M5.0 and loaded through M5.2/M5.6 creation path.
gates.name: Full chain execution

gates.evidence: 5 personas, 1000 total turns, sleep cycles after simulated days.
gates.name: Longitudinal runtime

gates.evidence: trait-distance stability and memory/procedural growth checks after sleep cycles.

gates.evidence: automated rule-baseline action divergence; LLM/human judging recorded as optional.

gates.evidence: manipulation/context-switch/long-input checks plus safety-layer blocked topic and precision anomaly checks.
